examples: We predict this will dramatically reduce absenteeism in our schools and workplaces.
Absenteeism and lateness hurt productivity and, since work was specialized, disrupted the regular factory routine.
An innovative treatment has come to our attention that promises to significantly reduce absenteeism in our schools and workplaces.
Depression is a major cause of disability, absenteeism, and productivity loss among working-age adults .
Mahaffey ticked off a list of counterproposals--involving break time, overtime, absenteeism and janitorial services.
